ttps: Deliver Malicious App via Authorized App Store
mitre_techniques: Deliver Malicious App via Authorized App Store
data.detect: Add to threat hunting queue. Review endpoint EDR alerts for related TTPs. Check vulnerability scanner output for affected asset discovery.
data.analyze: TTPs observed: Active Scanning, Supply Chain Compromise, Trusted Relationship. Moderate exploitation potential. Proof-of-concept may exist. Affected asset class requires inventory assessment. Recommend targeted threat hunt on related ATT&CK techniques.
data.respond: STANDARD: Add IOCs to blocklist. Apply vendor patches within SLA window. Increase monitoring frequency on affected asset class. Document in incident tracker.
data.mitigation: Schedule patch in next sprint cycle (14-day window). Harden default configurations per CIS benchmarks. Review and tighten firewall rules for affected services.
recommendations: Schedule patch in next sprint (14-day window)
Add to threat hunting queue for next cycle
Review firewall rules for affected services
